pages.title: Current Limitations (MVP)
pages.text: $(li)[DONE] Items only (fluids/energy not yet supported) $(li)[DONE] 9-slot buffer (fixed size, no upgrades) $(li)[X] No filtering (Exporters pull ALL items from adjacent machines) $(li)[X] No priority (can't specify "extract from slot X first")

pages.title: Future Features
pages.text: $(li)[WIP] Fluid support (tanks, fluid pipes) $(li)[WIP] Energy support (batteries, cables) $(li)[WIP] Filtered Importers/Exporters (whitelist/blacklist items) $(li)[WIP] Larger buffers via upgrades $(li)[WIP] Priority settings (extract specific slots first) $(li)[WIP] Visual indicators (particles showing transfer)
